title: Disable Unused IAM Credentials
console_steps: 3. Select the user with unused credentials
5. Under 'Access keys', find keys unused for 90+ days
6. Click 'Make inactive' to disable the key
cli_example: aws iam update-access-key --user-name jdoe --access-key-id AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE --status Inactive

references.title: Ensure credentials unused for 90 days are disabled

risk_reduction: Medium — reduces attack surface from stale keys
